assertions.title: Generator produces valid TypeScript type definitions from entity specs

steps.expected: Generator outputs User and Task type definitions with required fields.
steps.observed: Targeted ExUnit assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot" && mix run --no-start -e '<Generator.generate_all from .bropilot/map to evidence dir>'
steps.expected: Generated .ts artifacts are written to evidence directory for inspection.
steps.observed: types.ts and routes.ts were generated under evidence/crud-generator/terminal-gen-1/generated/.

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Node --skipLibCheck true --lib ES2020,DOM .tmp-gen/types.ts .tmp-gen/routes.ts
steps.expected: Generated TypeScript passes type-checking with no emit.

evidence.snippet: types.ts includes `export interface User` and `export interface Task` with expected fields; tsc_noemit_ok

assertions.title: Generator maps column types to correct TypeScript types

steps.expected: Type mapping checks pass for uuid/varchar/text/timestamp/boolean/integer/enum and nullable columns.
steps.observed: Targeted ExUnit mapping assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.action: Inspect generated types output in evidence/generated/types.ts
steps.expected: Concrete mapped fields appear as TypeScript primitives with nullability markers.
steps.observed: Examples present: id:string, title:string, description:string | null, dueDate:string | null, workspaceId:string.

evidence.snippet: VAL-GEN-002 test passed; generated file shows expected primitive/nullability mapping patterns.

assertions.title: Generator produces valid Hono route handlers from API specs

steps.expected: Generated output includes Hono handlers for GET/POST/PUT/DELETE task routes.
steps.observed: Targeted ExUnit assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.expected: Route file contains handlers matching API specs.
steps.observed: All required route handler declarations are present.

steps.expected: Generated Hono route handlers type-check successfully.

assertions.title: Generator produces route handlers with correct HTTP methods

steps.expected: Method mapping is correct (GET→app.get, POST→app.post, PUT→app.put, DELETE→app.delete).
steps.observed: Targeted ExUnit method-mapping assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.expected: Generated route file shows one-to-one method-to-handler mapping.
steps.observed: Method declarations match expected handlers for each API path.

evidence.snippet: Method lines present: app.get('/api/tasks'), app.post('/api/tasks'), app.put('/api/tasks/:id'), app.delete('/api/tasks/:id').

assertions.title: Generator produces valid D1 migration SQL from entity columns

steps.expected: Generated migration includes expected CREATE TABLE statements.
steps.observed: Targeted ExUnit SQL generation assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.action: Run: rg -n "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users|CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks|CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workspaces|NOT NULL|DEFAULT 'member'|DEFAULT 'todo'|DEFAULT 'medium'" evidence/.../generated/migration.sql
steps.expected: SQL includes required tables, column constraints, and defaults.
steps.observed: All required table declarations and constraint/default lines are present.

steps.expected: Migration SQL parses successfully as SQLite-compatible SQL.

evidence.snippet: CREATE TABLE users/tasks/workspaces with NOT NULL + DEFAULTs present; sqlite3_parse_ok

assertions.title: CRUD types match entity attribute schemas

steps.expected: Cross-flow assertion verifies each entity attribute appears in generated TS with correct mapped type.
steps.observed: Targeted cross-flow ExUnit assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot" && mix run --no-start -e '<compare entities.yaml attributes vs generated types.ts fields>'
steps.expected: Side-by-side comparison shows all entity attributes mapped to TS fields.
steps.observed: Comparison log shows all expected fields present (`=> true`) for User, Task, Workspace.

evidence.snippet: User/Task/Workspace comparison entries all resolved true for expected TS fields and mapped types.

assertions.title: CRUD migration SQL matches entity columns

steps.expected: Cross-flow assertion verifies generated SQL matches entity YAML columns and SQL type mapping.
steps.observed: Targeted cross-flow ExUnit assertion passed (1 test, 0 failures).

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot" && mix run --no-start -e '<compare entities.yaml columns vs generated migration.sql>'
steps.expected: Side-by-side comparison shows all table columns present with correct SQL types and non-null constraints.
steps.observed: Comparison log confirms all table/column checks as present=true and not_null_ok=true where required.

evidence.snippet: users/tasks/workspaces columns all present with expected SQL types and NOT NULL handling per entity specs.

frictions.description: Initial `mix run` attempt tried to boot the full application and failed because port 4000 was already in use.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran generator command with `mix run --no-start` to avoid starting shared services.

frictions.description: Initial `tsc --noEmit` run against routes.ts from mission evidence path could not resolve `hono` module types.
frictions.resolution: Copied generated TS files into `packages/crud/.tmp-gen/` and reran `npx tsc --noEmit` there; compilation succeeded.

summary: Tested 7 assertions (VAL-GEN-001..005, VAL-CROSS-032, VAL-CROSS-033) via terminal flow; all 7 passed with supporting command logs and generated artifact evidence.
